# Real-receipt fixtures

Photos of actual receipts used by the opt-in live-Anthropic integration suite (`src/lib/parseReceipt.test.ts`, gated on `RUN_ANTHROPIC_TESTS=1`). Each entry records who provided the photo and what shape it covers.

| File | Source | Shape it exercises |
|------|--------|--------------------|
| `polish-frac.jpg` | User-provided (project owner's own purchase, Warsaw 2026). Personal photo, used with permission. | Polish `PARAGON FISKALNY` from Frac Bis Sp. z o.o. Tests the all-inclusive math case (`Σ items == SUMA PLN`) and Polish-specific labels (`PODSUMA`, `SUMA PLN`, `PTU A/C`, `Sp.op.A/C`). |

When adding a new file:
1. Put the image under `tests/fixtures/real/` and add a row above with attribution and what it tests.
2. Reference it from a test in `src/lib/parseReceipt.test.ts`, gated behind `describe.skipIf(!RUN)` so the offline test run stays green when the file is absent.
3. Note that fixtures here are NOT regenerated by `pnpm fixtures` — they're real photos and must be committed by hand.
